title: Protocol Governance
subtitle: DAOs, Voting & Proposals
description: Design and participate in on-chain governance systems — DAO structures, voting mechanisms, proposal lifecycles, and community coordination.

lessons.title: DAO Structures
lessons.description: Different DAO models — token-based, multi-sig, hybrid, and legal wrappers.
lessons.topics: Token DAOs, Multi-sig DAOs, Hybrid models, Legal structures

lessons.title: Voting Mechanisms
lessons.description: Quadratic voting, conviction voting, token-weighted voting, and delegation.
lessons.topics: Token-weighted voting, Quadratic voting, Conviction voting, Delegate systems

lessons.title: Proposal Lifecycle
lessons.description: From temperature check to on-chain execution — the full proposal pipeline.
lessons.topics: Temperature checks, RFC process, Voting periods, Execution & timelocks

lessons.title: Treasury Governance
lessons.description: Managing DAO treasuries through proposals, multi-sig, and streaming payments.
lessons.topics: Treasury proposals, Multi-sig execution, Streaming payments, Accounting & reporting

lessons.title: Community Coordination
lessons.description: Tools and practices for effective community governance and participation.
lessons.topics: Discussion forums, Governance tools, Participation incentives, Conflict resolution
